svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"><diagram name="Diagram" id="d1"><mxGraphModel dx="900" dy="500" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="600" math="0" shadow="0"><root><mxCell id="0" /><mxCell id="1" parent="0" /><mxCell id="raw" value="Raw digital input signal" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#cccccc;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="0" y="20" width="160" height="50" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="filt" value="Debounce filter<br><b>DInFilt</b>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="200" y="20" width="140" height="50" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="log" value="Logic inversion<br><b>DInLog.bit</b>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="380" y="20" width="140" height="50" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="port" value="<b>DInPort.bit</b>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="560" y="20" width="140" height="50" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e0" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="raw" target="filt"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="filt" target="log"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e2" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="log" target="port"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel></diagram></mxfile>
